question:
What are the three hazard classes should NOT be loaded into a trailer that has a heater air conditioner unit?

1) Class 2 explosives, Class 3 flammable solids, and Division 2.1 inhalation hazard
2) Class 1 explosives, Class 8 corrosives, and Division 5 oxidizers
3) Class 1 explosives, Class 3 flammable liquids, and Division 2.1 flammable gas
canonical_answer: Class 1 explosives, Class 3 flammable liquids, and Division 2.1 flammable gas

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: Class 1 explosives, Class 3 flammable liquids, and Division 2.1 flammable gas

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: Class 1 explosives, Class 3 flammable liquids, and Division 2.1 flammable gas

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: Class 1 explosives, Class 3 flammable liquids, and Division 2.1 flammable gas

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: Class 1 explosives, Class 3 flammable liquids, and Division 2.1 flammable gas

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Test Answers
appears_in.answer: Class 1 explosives, Class 3 flammable liquids, and Division 2.1 flammable gas
